name: ZenityX A1111 Colab Full
readme:
# ZenityX A1111 Colab Full

AUTOMATIC1111 with the original SD 1.5 ControlNet and IP-Adapter bundle. First startup downloads about 15 GiB. Open Pod logs to copy the generated WebUI login, then connect to HTTP port 7860. A 50-100 GB Network Volume mounted at /workspace is recommended for continued use.
